chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2459 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For order on MA No.9099/2017. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Record reflects that this petition is pending since 2017 and it was lastly fixed on 23.10.2017; thereafter, no efforts have been taken to fix the matter in Court. The petitioner should be vigilant in pursuing the matter; however, he lacks his interest in the present proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
